title: astragalus flavus var. higginsii
intro: Astragalus flavus var. higginsii, also known as Higgins' milkvetch, is a plant species native to North America, belonging to the legume family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Astragalus flavus var. higginsii include immune system support, cardiovascular health promotion, and potential anti-aging effects. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, capsules, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
